category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Egypt EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Egypt EOS standards access, GOEIC import-control context, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 technical expectations, EgyptERA electricity-utility rules, connector compatibility, grid connection, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与埃及 EOS 标准获取、GOEIC 进口监管背景、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 技术要求、EgyptERA 电力监管规则、连接器兼容性、并网以及安全/EMC证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與埃及 EOS 標準取得、GOEIC 進口監管背景、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 技術要求、EgyptERA 電力監管規則、連接器相容性、併網以及安全/EMC證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EOS standard-scope determination, GOEIC customs or import clearance decision, EgyptERA licensing assessment, grid-connection approval, tariff determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Egyptian standards, import, electrical-installation, utility, tariff, telecom, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EOS标准适用范围裁定、GOEIC海关或进口放行决定、EgyptERA许可评估、并网批准、电价判定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行埃及标准、进口、电气安装、电力公司、电价、通信及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EOS標準適用範圍裁定、GOEIC海關或進口放行決定、EgyptERA許可評估、併網批准、電價判定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及標準、進口、電氣安裝、電力公司、電價、通訊及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Egypt, the practical gaps are EOS / IEC standards mapping, GOEIC import and conformity-document handling, GB/T-to-IEC connector redesign, EgyptERA and utility connection review, electricity-tariff and operating context, and safety / EMC evidence. Do not assume a blanket mandatory whole-unit certificate for every EV charger model without a current EOS / GOEIC / EgyptERA instrument that names the product and route.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入埃及时，主要实际差距包括 EOS / IEC 标准映射、GOEIC 进口及符合性文件处理、GB/T到IEC连接器重新设计、EgyptERA及电力公司接入审查、电价和运营背景，以及安全/EMC证据。没有现行 EOS / GOEIC / EgyptERA 文件明确点名产品和路径时，不应假定每个充电桩型号都需要统一的整机强制证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入埃及時，主要實際差距包括 EOS / IEC 標準映射、GOEIC 進口及符合性文件處理、GB/T到IEC連接器重新設計、EgyptERA及電力公司接入審查、電價和營運背景，以及安全/EMC證據。沒有現行 EOS / GOEIC / EgyptERA 文件明確點名產品和路徑時，不應假定每個充電樁型號都需要統一的整機強制證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
